creator: universite@ukr.net
text:
# grep watch messages
May  7 00:50:18 node2 kernel: xl0: watchdog timeout (missed Tx interrupts) -- recovering

# devinfo -rv | grep phy
                    ukphy0 pnpinfo oui=0x85a model=0x0 rev=0x0 at phyno=24
                rgephy0 pnpinfo oui=0xe04c model=0x11 rev=0x4 at phyno=1
